operational_scenes.scene_title: Introduction and Overview of Opti Suite Training
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Introduce training session and provide high-level overview of Opti Suite
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract foundational context and system overview
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Establish baseline understanding for subsequent technical details

operational_scenes.scene_title: Current Manual Sorting Process and Challenges
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe existing manual sorting process and its inefficiencies
operational_intents: Explain manual chute and bagging process
Identify pain points in current system
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Capture operational challenges and manual workflow details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understand baseline process to contextualize automation benefits

operational_scenes.scene_title: Introduction to Modular AGV System and UPS Partnership
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain modular AGV system development and UPS integration
operational_intents: Describe modular system concept with AGVs
Outline communication standards across UPS buildings
List core system components and software integration
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract system architecture and integration details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify system components and communication protocols

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Operation and Robot Management System (RMS) Details
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Detail AGV operation, sensor integration, and RMS responsibilities
operational_intents: Explain AGV sensor functions and collision detection
Describe RMS role in task assignment and routing
Clarify separation of logic between AGV and RMS
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Capture technical operational details of AGV and RMS
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understand robot control and management system interactions

operational_scenes.scene_title: Tote Rack Design and Package Handling Features
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe physical design of tote racks and package alignment features
operational_intents: Explain tote rack structure and alignment mechanisms
Discuss package handling to minimize floor items
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract physical system design and handling features
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understand mechanical aspects affecting package flow

operational_scenes.scene_title: Tippers, Software Integration, and Network Communication
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain tipper mechanisms, software integration, and network protocols
operational_intents: Outline Opti Sweep software integration with hardware
Explain network separation and secure communication protocols

operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify system interoperability and communication architecture
